title: WIRDV — Weirdo / electrode (Robotron)
tldr: Idiosyncratic GWAVE preset — uses a different wavetable + offset combination than the canonical presets, producing the "electrode hum" character. Catalogue note: `$0D` byte at the end (= 13 decimal).
how: GWAVE preset with bytes `FCB $21, $30, $00, $FF, $00, 27, $0D`. The `$0D` final byte is unusual — different from the typical `XXXSND-GFRTAB` pattern. Possibly directly addresses a small constant pattern.
watch: GWAVE engine view's `FOFSET` and pattern walk — different shape than HBDV / STDV.
